basic_details.job_title: HAL Female Gynaecologist Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline
basic_details.short_information: Hindustan Aeronautics (HAL) has released the official Female Gynaecologist (Visiting Consultant) Recruitment 2026 notification. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced under the HAL Female Gynaecologist (Visiting Consultant) Recruitment 2026. Eligible candidates up to 65 years of age with a PG Degree, DNB, or PG Diploma in Gynaecology can apply offline on or before 31 July 2026. The official notification PDF and offline application details are available below.

qualification.education_qualification: PG Degree / DNB / PG Diploma in Gynaecology
qualification.details: PG Degree / DNB / PG Diploma in Gynaecology

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for HAL Female Gynaecologist (Visiting Consultant) Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: https://www.hal-india.co.in.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 31-07-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

content_sections.heading: HAL Female Gynaecologist Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates who are interested in applying for the HAL Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form. Download HAL Female Gynaecologist Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: HAL Female Gynaecologist Eligibility Criteria 2026
content_sections.text: PG Degree / DNB / PG Diploma in Gynaecology

content_sections.heading: HAL Female Gynaecologist Recruitment 2026 - Important Dates
How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to apply for HAL Female Gynaecologist (Visiting Consultant) Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before applying. Download the application form from the official website: https://www.hal-india.co.in. Fill the application form carefully with correct information. Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates. Check all details carefully before submission. Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed. Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 31-07-2026. Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

content_sections.heading: HAL Female Gynaecologist Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the HAL Female Gynaecologist (Visiting Consultant) recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the application for the HAL Female Gynaecologist (Visiting Consultant) recruitment is 31st July 2026.

faq.question: Q2. What is the total number of vacancies for the Female Gynaecologist post?
faq.answer: There is a total of 1 vacancy for the Female Gynaecologist (Visiting Consultant) post.

faq.question: Q3. What is the required qualification for the Female Gynaecologist post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a PG Degree / DNB / PG Diploma in Gynaecology to be eligible for this post.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for the Female Gynaecologist (Visiting Consultant) position?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Female Gynaecologist (Visiting Consultant) position is 65 years.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for the Female Gynaecologist (Visiting Consultant) post?
faq.answer: The salary offered for the Female Gynaecologist (Visiting Consultant) post is Rs. 16,800/- per visit.

faq.question: Q6. How can candidates apply for this recruitment?
faq.answer: Candidates need to apply offline by sending the duly filled application form to the official address mentioned in the notification.

faq.question: Q7. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment.

faq.question: Q8. What is the selection process for the HAL Female Gynaecologist (Visiting Consultant) recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process for this recruitment will be based on an Interview.

faq.question: Q9. What is the advertisement number for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The advertisement number for this recruitment is KPT/VC-01/2026.

faq.question: Q10. In which city and state is this HAL recruitment being conducted?
faq.answer: This HAL recruitment is being conducted in Sunabeda, Odisha.
